name: Swarm Integration Trajectory Evaluation
description: End-to-end golden dataset for the full swarm. Tests that every specialist fires in parallel, each calls the correct tools in order, and synthesis applies majority voting.

parts.text: Appraise a Monet Water Lilies, oil on canvas, 80x100cm, painted in 1906. Acquired via Christie's London 1989 (Lot 42). Condition good, minor craquelure. Country of origin: France.

AUTHENTICATE. All three specialists independently authenticated. Majority voting confirms authentication. Estimated value range $10M to $40M. Provenance is clean via Christie's 1989. Style consistent with Monet's mature Water Lilies period.
Appraise an unsigned abstract acrylic, 60x60cm, estimated 2010s. No ownership history. Condition excellent.
VERIFY_FURTHER. Lack of attribution and provenance prevents authentication. Market value limited without artist identity. Excellent condition is the only positive factor.
